testExecution.unitVerbose: go test -v ./internal/metrics/... -> TestAlertProducerFailuresMetric PASS + TestAlertDeliveryMetrics PASS (1.067s)

rounds.note: Observability symmetry restored — AlertProducerFailures counter wired into all 4 alert producers (Bill, TripPrep, ReturnWindow, Relationship) closing the gap with AlertsProduced and AlertDelivery* metric families.

findingClasses: F1: Spec→Code File Citation Drift (22 atomic citations in scopes.md naming wrong package/file after post-certification engine split at HEAD 554e620f)
F2: Implementation Files List Incompleteness (Scopes 1-4 Implementation Files lists omit 4 post-split files: synthesis.go, briefs.go, alert_producers.go, resurface.go)
F3: Design Diagram Drift (design.md Intelligence Engine Components diagram showed fictional 4-subdirectory hierarchy not reflecting actual flat package layout)

implementationSurfaces: specs/004-phase3-intelligence/scopes.md (22 function citations corrected to actual files synthesis.go/briefs.go/alert_producers.go/resurface.go/digest/generator.go; Implementation Files lists for Scopes 1-4 extended)
specs/004-phase3-intelligence/design.md (Intelligence Engine Components diagram replaced fictional 4-subdir layout with actual flat layout)
specs/004-phase3-intelligence/bugs/BUG-004-003-governance-baseline-drift/ (all 7 artifacts: spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, state.json, uservalidation.md, report.md)
rounds.note: Governance baseline drift closed — Spec 004 scopes.md and design.md now faithfully reflect post-certification engine split at HEAD 554e620f. Artifact-only closure pattern; no runtime/test code touched.

findingClasses: F1: Parser non-determinism for multi-phrase inputs (range interactionMap is randomized; multi-phrase inputs like 'made it then tried it later' returned different InteractionType values across runs)

F2: Lost-update race on artifacts.relevance_score (updateRelevanceFromAnnotation did SELECT current → compute → UPDATE new without serialization; concurrent annotations against the same artifact dropped deltas)
implementationSurfaces: internal/annotation/parser.go (sort import + sortedInteractionPhrasesList cached length-desc + alphabetical-tiebreaker slice; Parse loop iterates the sorted slice instead of the randomized map)

internal/intelligence/annotations.go (single atomic UPDATE artifacts SET relevance_score = LEAST(GREATEST(COALESCE(relevance_score, 0.5) + $1, 0), 1) WHERE id = $2 RETURNING relevance_score; exported ApplyAnnotationRelevanceForTest wrapper)

testExecution.integrationCompile: go build -tags integration ./tests/integration/... -> CLEAN; go vet -tags integration ./tests/integration/... -> CLEAN
testExecution.check: ./smackerel.sh check -> CLEAN (config-validate + env_file drift + scenario-lint all OK)

rounds.note: Annotation pipeline stability hardening — two latent defects (parser non-determinism and SELECT→compute→UPDATE lost-update race) closed with persistent regression coverage (unit + integration tests committed). Bounded-range clamp moved from application code into SQL (LEAST/GREATEST/COALESCE) — defence-in-depth even if writers were not serialized.
